prerequisiteDocs: FE-05 test order + test generation docs: docs/frontend/FE-05-test-generation-frontend/README.md
Backend planning package for FE-15: docs/features/FE-15-llm-suggestion-review

ValidationMessageSnippets: ReviewNotes la bat buoc khi reject suggestion.
ModifiedContent la bat buoc khi Modify suggestion.
Da vuot qua gioi han LLM calls
Da vuot qua gioi han test case

notes: specificationId la bat buoc; Guid rong se bi runtime validation reject.
forceRefresh chi bo qua pending-preview guard va supersede bo Pending hien tai.
forceRefresh khong ep backend bo qua raw suggestion cache cua FE-06.

properties: action: string enum = Approve | Reject | Modify
reviewNotes: string? optional but required when action = Reject
modifiedContent: EditableLlmSuggestionInput? required when action = Modify
notes: action parse case-insensitive.
rowVersion la concurrency token bat buoc cho ca 3 action.
Approve retry tren suggestion da materialize se duoc xu ly idempotent.
Top-level field null/omit se fallback ve original suggestion.
request/expectation/variables la whole-block replacement neu FE gui block do.

properties: refinementStatus: string? pending | succeeded | failed | cancelled
notes: Response 201 van hop le ngay ca khi totalSuggestions = 0.
source = local-draft va llmModel = local-draft la expected success path, khong phai loi.
refinementStatus = pending nghia la BE da tao background refinement job va FE nen poll generation-status bang refinementJobId.
suggestions[] trong generate response la draft co the review ngay; currentUserFeedback va feedbackSummary hien tai thuong null.
Khi refinement job Completed, FE phai refetch GET /llm-suggestions de lay refined suggestions va rowVersion moi.

properties: status: string enum = Queued | Triggering | WaitingForCallback | Completed | Failed | Cancelled
notes: Dung chung TestGenerationJob status endpoint.
Cho LLM suggestion refinement, testCasesGenerated la so refined suggestions da persist khi Completed.
FE nen truyen jobId thay vi lay latest job theo suite de tranh nham voi job generate test cases khac.
suggestedRequest, suggestedExpectation, va modifiedContent la string JSON; FE can JSON.parse neu muon render editor typed.
suggestedVariables va suggestedTags da duoc parse san.
cacheKey hien co trong model nhung generate path hien tai dang set null.
Day la shape ben trong chuoi suggestedRequest.
Preview-generated rows hien tai thuong de bodyType va timeout = null.
Day la shape ben trong chuoi suggestedExpectation.
Preview-generated rows hien tai thuong chi fill expectedStatus va co the co bodyContains.
Read-only metadata nay di kem list/detail response du feedback write endpoint thuoc FE-16.
reasonCode hien chi co tren ConflictException hoac DbUpdateConcurrencyException.
Non-owner access hien map ve 400 ProblemDetails thay vi 403.

endpoints.name: GenerateLlmSuggestionPreview
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails khi body malformed JSON hoac property type khong bind duoc.
400 ProblemDetails cho non-owner access, suite archived, specificationId = Guid.Empty, pending suggestions da ton tai khi forceRefresh = false, hoac vuot MaxLlmCallsPerMonth.
409 ProblemDetails voi reasonCode=ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED khi suite chua co approved API order.
notes: Current implementation tra local draft nhanh, persist durable preview rows, va start async n8n refinement job.
forceRefresh=true supersede cac row Pending cu truoc khi tao draft moi.
Neu LLM pipeline tra ve 0 scenario thi response van la 201 voi totalSuggestions = 0 va suggestions = [].
Current generate path set cacheKey = null tren tung suggestion row.
Neu response co refinementJobId, FE poll GET /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/generation-status?jobId={refinementJobId}.

endpoints.name: GetGenerationStatusForLlmSuggestionRefinement
query: jobId: Guid required for FE polling
problemCases: 400 ProblemDetails khi jobId va suiteId deu rong; FE binh thuong khong gap vi route da co suiteId.
404 khi jobId khong ton tai hoac job khong thuoc suite/user hien tai.
notes: Poll route nay sau POST /llm-suggestions/generate neu response co refinementJobId.
Terminal statuses: Completed, Failed, Cancelled.
Khi Completed, refetch GET /llm-suggestions.
Khi Failed/Cancelled, giu draft hien tai va cho user review hoac regenerate voi forceRefresh=true.

endpoints.name: GetLlmSuggestions
notes: Khong co pagination, search, hay suggestionType filter.
reviewStatus/testType sai enum hien tai se bi ignore thay vi tra loi validation error.
Moi item da co currentUserFeedback va feedbackSummary; neu khong co feedback thi currentUserFeedback = null va feedbackSummary la object dem 0.

endpoints.name: GetLlmSuggestionDetail
problemCases: 404 khi suiteId khong ton tai hoac suggestionId khong thuoc suite hien tai.
notes: Response dung cung model voi list route.
Detail route cung hydrate currentUserFeedback va feedbackSummary.

endpoints.name: ReviewLlmSuggestion
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails khi body malformed JSON hoac property type khong bind duoc.

400 ProblemDetails cho non-owner access, rowVersion rong, rowVersion khong phai base64 hop le, action khong hop le, reject khong co reviewNotes, modify khong co modifiedContent, suggestion khong con Pending, hoac vuot MaxTestCasesPerSuite.
404 khi suiteId khong ton tai hoac suggestionId khong thuoc suite hien tai.
409 ProblemDetails voi reasonCode=ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED khi approve/modify nhung suite khong con approved API order.
409 ProblemDetails voi reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT khi rowVersion stale hoac co DbUpdateConcurrency conflict.
notes: Approve retry sau khi suggestion da co appliedTestCaseId se duoc treat nhu idempotent success va tra suggestion hien tai.
Reject chi doi review state; approve/modify materialize real TestCase va set appliedTestCaseId.
modify la top-level partial fallback, nhung request/expectation/variables la whole-block replacement.
Review response hien tai duoc map tu entity raw; currentUserFeedback va feedbackSummary thuong null.

runtimeRules: Generate preview now returns local draft first and starts async n8n refinement in background.
forceRefresh supersedes durable Pending suggestions before creating a new local draft.
Owner check dua tren suite.CreatedById, khong dua tren reviewedById hay feedback user id.
Current generate path luon tao SuggestionType = BoundaryNegative va ReviewStatus = Pending.
Current generate path set CacheKey = null tren entity du model van expose field nay.
SuggestedRequest, SuggestedExpectation, va ModifiedContent duoc serialize camelCase JSON string.
SuggestedTags duoc auto-build voi source `llm-suggested`, co them `auto-generated` va tag theo test type, roi merge them tag tra ve tu LLM.
SuggestedVariables duoc map san thanh array object trong response; field extractFrom thuong la body/header/status.
List route sort theo DisplayOrder asc, la thu tu suggestion duoc persist khi generate.
Invalid reviewStatus/testType filter hien tai bi ignore trong list route.
Review reject khong tang suite version va khong tao TestCase.
Review approve/modify tao TestCase, TestCaseChangeLog, TestSuiteVersion, va tang suite.Version.
Generate preview check quota MaxLlmCallsPerMonth truoc khi tao draft/refinement job; approve/modify check quota MaxTestCasesPerSuite truoc materialize.
Callback endpoint /api/test-generation/llm-suggestions/callback/{jobId} la n8n-only, FE khong goi route nay.
Feedback write endpoint va bulk-review endpoint cung nam trong LlmSuggestionsController nhung khong nam trong file contract FE-15 nay.

currentUserFeedback.notes: Mo ta nay dung voi bug da gap tren staging.

reviewRejectRequest.reviewNotes: Suite nay khong can cover duplicate-email o endpoint nay.

reviewModifyRequest.reviewNotes: Sua lai payload va expectation truoc khi apply.

pendingSuggestionsExist400.title: Bad Request
pendingSuggestionsExist400.detail: Da co suggestion preview dang cho review. Su dung ForceRefresh=true de tao moi.
pendingSuggestionsExist400.message: Da co suggestion preview dang cho review. Su dung ForceRefresh=true de tao moi.

orderConfirmationRequired409.title: Conflict
orderConfirmationRequired409.detail: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan. Vui long review/approve thu tu API truoc khi tao test cases.
orderConfirmationRequired409.message: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan. Vui long review/approve thu tu API truoc khi tao test cases.

concurrency409.title: Conflict
concurrency409.detail: Suggestion da duoc thay doi boi thao tac khac. Vui long tai lai va thu lai.
concurrency409.message: Suggestion da duoc thay doi boi thao tac khac. Vui long tai lai va thu lai.

suggestionNotFound404.title: Not Found
suggestionNotFound404.detail: Khong tim thay suggestion voi ma '8acbca9f-27f7-467a-bd4a-4c3b3f8f1455'.
suggestionNotFound404.message: Khong tim thay suggestion voi ma '8acbca9f-27f7-467a-bd4a-4c3b3f8f1455'.

relatedNotes: Neu FE vua goi POST /generate thanh cong, dung suggestions[] trong 201 response de render draft ngay.
Neu response co refinementJobId, poll GET /generation-status?jobId=... den khi Completed/Failed/Cancelled.
Khi Completed, refetch GET /llm-suggestions de lay refined suggestions moi.
Neu Failed, draft van dung duoc; khong tu dong goi lai POST /generate trong loop.
Neu FE muon cho user edit nested request/expectation/variables, hay hydrate editor state tu chuoi JSON trong suggestedRequest/suggestedExpectation truoc.
Feedback write va bulk review da ton tai o runtime hien tai, nhung nen duoc handoff rieng theo FE-16 va FE-17.
